notes: 61/61 R4 tests green (42 web b2b + 19 BE leads) — verified by re-run, museum-web/src/app/[locale]/b2b/__tests__/* and museum-backend/tests/unit/{routes,leads}/*

R19 (Sentry breadcrumb on submit) NOT implemented — museum-web/src/app/[locale]/b2b/B2bContactForm.tsx has no import of @sentry/nextjs and no Sentry.addBreadcrumb call. Only mention is a comment in the test header at B2bContactForm.test.tsx:4. The B2bContactForm.test.tsx itself contains zero Sentry assertions despite the header advertising 'R19 (Sentry breadcrumb)'.

AC6 / spec §0.3 / T1.6 deliverable missing — museum-web/e2e/a11y/public-b2b.a11y.spec.ts was an explicit scope-IN file (Playwright + axe-core, mirror of public-support.a11y.spec.ts). It is not present in the diff or the worktree. AC6 cannot be satisfied without it.

R7 spec is internally contradictory ('body containing 5 user-facing fields, no consent, no website') vs R10/R11 which require BE to validate consent + drop honeypot. Impl correctly sends consent+website to BE — matches R10/R11 intent. Not a regression, but spec ambiguity worth noting.

R12 (rate-limit 5/600s/IP) verified by tests/unit/routes/leads.route.test.ts:145-159; R10 silent honeypot drop verified in submitB2bLead.useCase.ts:77-83 + tests/unit/leads/submitB2bLead.useCase.test.ts:119-129.
git diff HEAD~1 HEAD --stat -- museum-frontend/ museum-backend/src/modules/chat/ → empty. No chat-ux collision.

No new feature flag — env.b2bInboxEmail wired in museum-backend/src/config/env.ts:504 and env.types.ts:239 with AUDIT_CHAIN_ALERT_EMAIL precedent documented inline. .env.example:158-161 comments it as 'config value, not a feature flag'. Composition root in modules/leads/useCase/index.ts:17 falls back to supportInboxEmail.

Diff stays inside R4 scope-IN: new museum-backend/src/modules/leads/* (hexagonal), new museum-web/src/app/[locale]/b2b/*, Footer + i18n + dicts. Three pre-existing test mock files updated (Header.test.tsx, accessibility-audit.test.tsx, component-snapshots.test.tsx) to extend Dictionary footer.links shape — necessary co-edits, not drift.
No 'as any' / @ts-ignore / eslint-disable in any of the new files (verified by grep).

Textbook hexagonal: modules/leads/{domain/ports, adapters/primary/http/{routes,schemas}, adapters/secondary/notifier, useCase/}. Barrel at modules/leads/index.ts and composition root at modules/leads/useCase/index.ts (Brevo or Noop selection on env.brevoApiKey).
EmailB2bLeadNotifier + NoopB2bLeadNotifier mirror the support module dual-notifier pattern exactly. Reuses BrevoEmailService (no @getbrevo/brevo SDK install — N9 respected).

Zod schema in modules/leads/adapters/primary/http/schemas/leads.schemas.ts is minimal: literal(true) for consent, max bounds on every string, role enum reused via B2B_LEAD_ROLES exported from the port. Use case input is a superset of payload with explicit comment justifying widening consent to boolean for defense-in-depth.

Minor DRY: B2bLeadRole is redeclared in tests/helpers/leads/b2bLead.fixtures.ts:14 instead of importing the prod type. Acceptable per red-test discipline (tests had to compile before prod existed) but ideally fixtures import from @modules/leads now that the type exists.
Form a11y is solid: every input has
Honeypot properly hidden — div with position:absolute left:-10000px AND aria-hidden='true' AND tabIndex={-1} AND autoComplete='off'. Out of tab order, not announced.
Consent checkbox + privacy link wired via aria-describedby (B2bContactForm.tsx:254/264). RGPD opt-in unchecked by default (B2bContactForm.tsx:28).
Design tokens used (bg-primary-50, text-text-primary, border-primary-200, focus:ring-primary-200) — no raw hex/px in page.tsx or B2bContactForm.tsx.

DEVIATION from spec §3.2 / §4 / N6: differentiator cards do NOT include inline SVG icons (aria-hidden). page.tsx:96-101 renders only title + description. No unicode emoji used so N6 still respected, but D2 designed the cards with icons.
AC6 cannot be satisfied — public-b2b.a11y.spec.ts missing (see correctness).

UFR-013 RESPECTED on differentiator #5 — FR: 'Pensé pour avant, pendant et après la visite. Une expérience hors-musée à venir pour préparer la venue et prolonger la balade.' EN: 'Designed for before, during, and after the visit. A future-ready out-of-museum companion to prepare the visit and extend the journey.' Honesty test museum-web/src/app/[locale]/b2b/__tests__/honesty-walk-copy.test.ts asserts forbidden present-tense phrases absent + required intent markers ('à venir' / 'pensé pour' / 'designed for' / 'future-ready') present in both locales. Walk V1 not pitched as a shipped feature.

PII normalization: email lowercased + trimmed in submitB2bLead.useCase.ts:51 BEFORE notifier call. Defense-in-depth (use case validates consent + email even though Zod already does, useCase.ts:47-49).

Honeypot silent drop: useCase.ts:77-83 returns BEFORE notifier.notify if website non-empty after trim. No Brevo email sent on honeypot trigger. Whitespace-only website NOT treated as honeypot (defends against password-manager autofill false positives) — correct per spec §3.4 + Risk4.
Rate limit 5/600s/IP per R12 mirroring supportContactLimiter — routes/leads.route.ts:13-17. Verified by 6th-request 429 test.

BE logger.info (R20) at useCase.ts:85-90 logs only requestId / museumLength / role / honeypotTriggered — no PII. Email/name/message never logged. Honeypot trigger uses logger.warn with requestId only.
R19 (FE Sentry breadcrumb on submit) NOT implemented — minor telemetry gap, not security blocker, but spec deviation.
B2B_INBOX_EMAIL fallback to SUPPORT_INBOX_EMAIL documented in .env.example:158-161 — no surprise for ops on first deploy.

blockers: Add museum-web/e2e/a11y/public-b2b.a11y.spec.ts (Playwright axe-core, mirror museum-web/e2e/a11y/public-support.a11y.spec.ts targeting /fr/b2b and /en/b2b). Spec §0.3 + AC6 + T1.6 all required this file.

Implement R19 Sentry breadcrumb in museum-web/src/app/[locale]/b2b/B2bContactForm.tsx — on submit success and submit error call Sentry.addBreadcrumb({ category: 'b2b.lead.submit', data: { ok, status, museumLength, role, honeypotTriggered }, level: 'info'|'error' }) with NO email/name/message content per §3.6. Also add corresponding test assertion in B2bContactForm.test.tsx (the header comment claims R19 coverage but no test exists).
niceToHave: Add inline SVG icons (aria-hidden) to differentiator cards in museum-web/src/app/[locale]/b2b/page.tsx:96-101 to match spec §3.2 §4 / D2 visual intent — currently cards are text-only. Reuse the StorySection.tsx SVG pattern. Not blocking (no AC enforces it).
tests/helpers/leads/b2bLead.fixtures.ts:14-15 redeclares B2bLeadRole. Now that @modules/leads exports the type, import it from there instead of locally redeclaring to keep DRY across prod + test.

Consider adding the Vitest hard-coded-string test (AC5 / no-hardcoded-strings.test.ts) to a broader sweep — currently it scans only page.tsx + B2bContactForm.tsx, but a future b2b sub-component (e.g. icons.tsx) would silently bypass.
Verify AC9 (Lighthouse ≥95) locally or via the next ci-cd-web.yml run — not blocking but unverified at this review.

Footer.tsx ESLint exit code zero confirms the B2B link is wired, but spec AC11 expected Footer.test.tsx to assert the link renders on /fr/, /fr/support, /fr/privacy, /fr/b2b — the diff only adds two cases (FR / EN path prefix). Acceptable simplification since the Footer is route-agnostic, but the wider sweep was in the spec letter.

honestyVerification.differentiator5FrCopy: Pensé pour avant, pendant et après la visite — Une expérience hors-musée à venir pour préparer la venue et prolonger la balade.
honestyVerification.differentiator5EnCopy: Designed for before, during, and after the visit — A future-ready out-of-museum companion to prepare the visit and extend the journey.
anyClaimsContradicted: Green-code-agent commit message claims '47 contract tests (28 web + 19 BE)' but the web b2b suite shows 42 tests across 5 files (page=7, B2bContactForm=8, dict-symmetry=5, honesty-walk-copy=4, no-hardcoded-strings=17 it.each cases + 1 existence). Total verified = 42 + 19 = 61, not 47. Discrepancy likely because the commit message was drafted earlier; the worktree is correct.

Test file B2bContactForm.test.tsx header at line 4 claims it pins 'R19 (Sentry breadcrumb)' but contains zero Sentry-related assertions. R19 is unverified by tests AND unimplemented in production code.
